FeatureDescription: Automatically classify and prioritize incoming alarms using machine learning. Operators see a ranked list of critical alarms first, reducing mean-time-to-respond by up to 40%. Includes a confidence score and reasoning for each classification.

A centralized dashboard showing equipment health scores, remaining useful life estimates, and recommended maintenance windows. Integrates with existing CMMS to auto-generate work orders when thresholds are breached.
Enable field technicians to access work orders, schematics, and checklists without network connectivity. Changes sync automatically when the device reconnects. Supports iOS and Android.
Visualize energy consumption across all assets on a 24×7 heatmap grid. Identify peak usage windows and anomalies at a glance. Drill-down to individual asset level with one click.
Revamp permission management with a new role designer UI, inheritance rules, and audit log. Allows site admins to create custom roles without IT involvement. Includes a bulk-import option via CSV.
